phalita 1〉 adj. s. u. 2. phal.
— 2〉 m. Baum (eig. Fruchtbaum)  DHAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 n. ein best. Parfum, = śaileya  RĀJAN. ; unter śaileya steht als Synonym palita, nicht phalita.

results.rendered_html:
phalita p. p.
1 Having borne or reaped fruit, yielding fruit, fruitful.
2 Fulfilled, accomplished, realized (as a desire).
— taḥ A fruittree.
— tā A menstruous woman.
— taṃ A sort of perfume (śaileya).
